profile.name: Elena Krayneva
profile.title: MSc Digital Marketing & Analytics | Aspiring Marketing and Analytics Consultant
profile.about: MSc Digital Marketing & Analytics student with a background in business analysis and a strong interest in how positioning, performance drivers, and data-informed insights shape strategic growth decisions. I bridge the gap between metrics like CTR, CPA, and conversion rates and broader strategic implications.

experience.role: HR Business Partner Assistant – People Analytics & Reporting
experience.description: Analyzed workforce datasets (headcount, onboarding, attrition, leave trends) and translated findings into performance-driven insights to support workforce planning and business decision-making at one of Russia's largest digital retailers.

Coordinated freelance contracting workflows for 40+ contractors monthly within a consulting environment, ensuring cross-functional approvals across HR, legal, and finance. Focused on workflow optimization and coordination.
Coordinated workforce operations for a base of 3,000 employees. Managed shift allocation through internal systems to maintain operational continuity.
Managed job vacancy publications across platforms and coordinated initial candidate communication.
Tech startup environment: Structured internal documentation workflows and analyzed external funding opportunities (grants/financial support).

education.degree: Master of Science, Digital Marketing and Analytics
education.description: Focused on data-driven decision-making and marketing analytics. Projects in customer research, digital strategy, SEO, and performance analysis using AI-driven tools.
Specialization in HR Management. Foundation in business processes, organizational behavior, and data-based management. GPA: High achievement in project management and data-driven decision-making.

certifications: HubSpot Marketing Hub Software Certification (HubSpot, Feb 2026)
